message:
feat: add dolt_remotes patrol for periodic push to git remotes

Adds a new daemon patrol that periodically pushes Dolt databases to their
configured git remotes (15-minute cadence by default). For each database with
an 'origin' remote, it stages changes, commits, and pushes to the branch.

Config via daemon.json dolt_remotes section. Auto-discovers databases with
remotes when no explicit database list is configured.

Part of hq-dolt-launch epic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
